projects.title: QurbaniHat
projects.overview: QurbaniHat is a full-stack online livestock booking platform built for Eid ul-Adha, making it easier than ever for people in Bangladesh to find and book their Qurbani animals online.

projects.title: QurbaniHat
projects.overview: I recently built a food ordering web application where users can browse meals, explore recipes, and manage their cart — all in one place.

projects.title: Dragon News
projects.overview: Dragon News is a practice project where I focused on integrating Better Auth with Next.js and MongoDB — getting comfortable with sign up, log in, log out, session management, and protected routes in a real app environment.

projects.title: Digitool
projects.overview: recently built Digitool, a digital service marketplace designed to make buying digital products safer and easier. In today’s world, many users struggle to find trustworthy platforms for digital tools and often face scams or low-quality services. With Digitool, my goal was to create a reliable, user-friendly solution where users can confidently explore and purchase digital services.

projects.title: Book Vibe
projects.overview: Introducing Book Vibe, A Simple Way to Track Your Reading Journey. I recently built Book Vibe, a reading management web app designed to help users organize and track their books in a clean and intuitive way.

projects.title: AI Hub
projects.overview: I Built an AI Tool Discovery Platform – AI Hub. An interactive web application designed to help users explore and purchase a wide range of AI tools. The platform fetches real-time data from APIs and presents AI products in a clean, user-friendly interface for seamless discovery.

projects.title: Keen Keeper
projects.overview: Keen Keeper is a relationship management web application designed to help users organize, track, and strengthen their connections with friends and acquaintances. It centralizes important information about people in your life and logs every interaction, making relationship management more intentional and structured.

projects.title: PAYoo
projects.overview: PAYoo is Mobile Financial Service (MFS) simulation app while learning JavaScript. This project is fully built by me as part of my practice to strengthen my programming logic and problem-solving skills. password: 1234

projects.title: English Janala
projects.overview: I recently built a small project called English Janala, a web app designed to help people learn English words in a simple and organized way. While building this project, I focused on creating a smooth and easy user experience so that anyone can explore and learn words comfortably. To make learning easier, the words are divided into different lessons, and each word comes with useful information to help understand and remember it better.

projects.title: TechWave
projects.overview: A responsive podcast website built with pure HTML and vanilla CSS, implemented by converting Figma designs into code and optimized for multiple devices using media queries.
